@startuml
package com
    package iluwatar
        package multiton
            interface Logger
                interface NazgulName
                class Nazgul
                    note right of Nazgul
                        C
                    end
                    name : NazgulName
                    nazguls : Map<NazgulName, Nazgul>
                    Nazgul(name : NazgulName)
                    getInstance(name : NazgulName) : Nazgul
                    getName() : NazgulName
                    -name : NazgulName
                class App
                    note right of App
                        C
                    end
                    LOGGER : Logger
                    App()
                    main(args : String[])
            end
@enduml
